content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL: Normal volatility (Vol: 35.3%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive), market lacking a clear directional impulse.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Leading sectors: Banking & Finance and Retail & Food; Banking shows strength with HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND and VAKBN (1W: +2.98% | 1M: +0.95%) ABOVE TREND, Retail led by AEFES (1W: +5.49% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Lagging: Holding & Investment, Energy & Chemicals and Technology & Telecom; heavy weakness in holdings with DOHOL (1W: -8.25% | 1M: -12.42%) BELOW TREND and technology KONTR (1W: -8.15% | 1M: -26.05%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND; AEFES (1W: +5.49% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +4.45% | 1M: -5.37%) RECOVERY; TSKB (1W: +4.15% | 1M: -3.43%) RECOVERY; TCELL (1W: +4.06% | 1M: -10.71%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND; DOHOL (1W: -8.25% | 1M: -12.42%) BELOW TREND; KONTR (1W: -8.15% | 1M: -26.05%) BELOW TREND; ENKAI (1W: -7.11% | 1M: -15.52%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -5.70% | 1M: -13.60%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
High momentum: HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND; GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND; AEFES (1W: +5.49% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND; DOHOL (1W: -8.25% | 1M: -12.42%) BELOW TREND; KONTR (1W: -8.15% | 1M: -26.05%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking up 1W (+2.60%) and driving breadth; HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND, TSKB (1W: +4.15% | 1M: -3.43%) RECOVERY, AKBNK (1W: +0.78% | 1M: -13.25%) RECOVERY, GARAN (1W: +1.71% | 1M: -8.49%) RECOVERY.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed industrials: EREGL (1W: +1.31% | 1M: +5.34%) ABOVE TREND is the standout, FROTO (1W: +2.44% | 1M: -12.93%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: -4.54% | 1M: -16.36%) BELOW TREND and ENKAI (1W: -7.11% | 1M: -15.52%) BELOW TREND weigh on the group.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy soft overall (1W: -1.10%); pockets of strength TRALT (1W: +3.67% | 1M: +7.32%) ABOVE TREND and HEKTS (1W: +3.50% | 1M: +12.50%) ABOVE TREND, while PETKM (1W: -5.70% | 1M: -13.60%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: -5.68% | 1M: -19.16%) BELOW TREND and GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND are under pressure.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral regime — lean selective long in above-trend names (HALKB, EREGL, HEKTS) and maintain discipline on position sizing; trim or avoid structurally weak names in holdings, construction and lagging tech until 1M momentum stabilizes.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
HALKB (1W: +6.89% | 1M: +18.05%) ABOVE TREND for banking leadership; EREGL (1W: +1.31% | 1M: +5.34%) ABOVE TREND for industrial confirmation; GUBRF (1W: -10.36% | 1M: -15.44%) BELOW TREND as a high-volatility watch; TCELL (1W: +4.06% | 1M: -10.71%) RECOVERY for tech flows.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Watch Banking for breadth confirmation, Heavy Industry for leadership continuation (EREGL), and Energy & Chemicals for divergence between quality refiners and commodity-exposed names.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to short- and medium-term moving averages (20/50-day) — failure below the 20-day would risk a pullback, while a sustained break above recent 1M highs would validate a rotation into cyclicals; catalysts: CBRT comments, CPI and core inflation prints, FX moves, oil prices and corporate earnings updates.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility and mixed breadth. Trade selectively: favor above-trend banking, select industrials and quality energy names; avoid or trim positions in weak holdings, construction and beaten-down tech until momentum confirms.
